config_template.padding: pad_to_tile(0.0) required when shape is not tile-aligned; unpad_from_tile([{N},1,1,{C}]) on output

applicability_notes: torch_pattern_notes: Equivalent to global average pooling over spatial dims (H, W). ttnn operates on channels-last (NHWC) tensors, so model code typically wraps the op with permute(0,2,3,1) before and permute(0,3,1,2) after; these permutes are absorbed into the layout conversion and are part of the replaceable subsequence: permute(NCHW->NHWC) -> adaptive_avg_pool2d(.,(1,1)) -> permute(NHWC->NCHW).; ttnn_replacement: ttnn.global_avg_pool2d(input_tensor); constraints: ['Input must be channels-last (NHWC); insert permute(0,2,3,1) from NCHW torch layout', 'Output is [N, 1, 1, C] channels-last; permute(0,3,1,2) to recover NCHW', 'Input should be TILE_LAYOUT; non-tile-aligned shapes need pad_to_tile(0.0) and output unpad_from_tile']
